name: Essence of the Body amulet (Normal start)
description: Cheap baseline rare amulet with a guaranteed Life mod from an essence. Transmute the base to magic, essence it to rare with Life locked in, then exalt to fill any open slots.

steps.outcome: Normal → Magic with one random modifier. (Optionally also Augment to fill the second magic mod before essencing — both magic mods will carry over to the rare.)
Magic → Rare. Existing magic modifier(s) are PRESERVED and the essence's guaranteed +maximum Life mod is added on top. So a 1-mod Magic becomes a 2-mod Rare; a 2-mod Magic becomes a 3-mod Rare.
Each Exalt adds one random modifier (cap of 6 total). Stop when the result is usable — average ~3 exalts before a workable combo of resistances/attributes lands.

notes_for_user: Most reliable budget path. The guaranteed Life is your floor — even if Exalt slams land badly, the amulet is wearable. **Avoid using Greater Essence on a low-ilvl base** — Greater essences work on any ilvl but they bump the resulting item's required level (e.g. Greater essence on ilvl 15 → required level 48 to equip). For mid-game crafting stay on Lesser. Advanced: 'Omen of Dextral Exaltation' (held in inventory before exalting) forces suffix-only rolls and protects open prefixes for later mod control.
